_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》第001集(v2,按 prompts/script-rules.md 重写)。混合语言:旁白=narrator(越南语);人物对白+女主内心思考=中文(内心拍 inner:true,音色同她说话=qingwu 温柔小雅,字幕加💭标记,用户 2026-07-15 改)。人设铁律:灵兰懂一点中文但水平不高(能抓关键词:你醒了/医生/检查),禁写'一个字都听不懂'。画面=台词:坠湖拍必须画坠湖瞬间,'这不是我的手'拍必须画她惊愕盯手(独立场景 s2b-hands)。长句拆多拍(同sceneId共图),中文↔越南语逐句对应,全程三行卡拉OK。本集中文:你醒了、医生明天来检查你。

shots.content: A beautiful young Vietnamese woman in simple everyday clothes captured MID-FALL, tumbling backward off a wooden lakeside walkway into a dark lake at a Da Lat night market at night — her body tilted in mid-air just above the water surface, hair and arms flung upward, eyes wide with terror, mouth open in a scream, a violent burst of water splashing up where she hits the surface, blurred colorful night market lanterns and stalls in the background, dramatic moody cinematic night lighting, shot from the side at water level with real camera perspective. Wide landscape shot.

captions.local: Đêm ấy, ở chợ đêm Đà Lạt

captions.zh: 卖花姑娘灵兰坠入湖中
captions.local: cô gái bán hoa Linh Lan ngã xuống hồ

shots.content: A stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in an ornate red traditional wedding dress with a red veil suddenly wakes sitting up on a luxurious carved wooden wedding bed, in a dim opulent mansion bedroom glowing with tall red dragon-phoenix candles and gold double-happiness decorations, silk drapes, dazed and frightened expression, elegant cinematic medium-wide side shot. Landscape.

captions.zh: 睁开眼，她成了豪门新娘
captions.local: Mở mắt ra, cô đã thành tân nương hào môn
linh hồn nằm trong thân xác một người khác

shots.content: Close-up of a stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery as the wedding-night scene, both trembling hands raised in front of her chest, palms turned toward her face, staring down at her own unfamiliar hands with wide shocked disbelieving eyes and parted lips, as if these hands do not belong to her, dim opulent bedroom with red dragon-phoenix candles glowing softly in the blurred background, warm candlelight on her face and hands, single face in frame, cinematic landscape close-up with shallow depth of field.

captions.local: Đây không phải bàn tay của tôi
Sao lại thế này

shots.content: Close on an ornate vintage bronze vanity mirror in a dim red-candlelit opulent bedroom; reflected in the mirror is the face of a stunningly beautiful young Chinese woman in a red bridal dress staring at her own unfamiliar reflection with shock and disbelief, warm candlelight. Cinematic landscape framing of the mirror.

captions.local: Người trong gương
không phải là tôi

shots.content: A tall, coldly handsome young Chinese man in an impeccable dark charcoal suit stands beside a red wedding bed looking down with an icy detached gaze, dim opulent mansion bedroom with warm red candlelight; in the blurred foreground the bride is seen only from behind over her shoulder wearing the SAME ornate RED traditional Chinese wedding dress with gold embroidery and a red bridal veil as the wedding-night scenes (red fabric covering her shoulders and back, NO bare shoulders, NO white clothing), her face NOT visible. He is the only face in frame. Cinematic medium shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Cô tỉnh rồi
Đây là đâu

captions.zh: 这个人为什么在说中文
captions.local: Sao người này lại nói tiếng Trung

shots.content: Empty opulent Chinese wedding chamber at night — a close still life of tall red dragon-and-phoenix wedding candles burning, a gold paper-cut double-happiness symbol, two red wedding cups tied with red thread, silk embroidery, warm flickering candlelight, absolutely no people. Cinematic landscape still.

captions.local: Cô từng học một chút tiếng Trung
nhưng chỉ nghe hiểu được vài từ

shots.content: The tall coldly handsome young Chinese man in a dark charcoal suit turns and walks away toward the bedroom door, seen from behind and three-quarter back with a cold side profile, dim red-candlelit opulent mansion bedroom, he is the only person in frame. Cinematic landscape shot.

captions.pinyin: yī shēng míng tiān lái jiǎn chá nǐ
captions.local: Ngày mai bác sĩ đến kiểm tra cô

shots.content: Close-up of the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in a red wedding dress clutching her red silk skirt with trembling hands, wide frightened eyes, alone in a dim red-candlelit opulent bedroom, single face in frame. Cinematic landscape close-up.

captions.local: Bác sĩ… sẽ đến kiểm tra tôi
Bác sĩ đến, họ sẽ phát hiện
tôi không phải là cô ấy

shots.content: The beautiful young Chinese bride wearing the SAME ornate RED TRADITIONAL CHINESE WEDDING DRESS (qipao-style long gown) with gold embroidery and a red bridal veil as in the earlier wedding-night scenes (NOT a modern short dress) — sits small and alone on the edge of a huge carved wedding bed in a vast dim opulent mansion bedroom, tall red dragon-phoenix candles flickering, camera pulled far back showing the lonely grand room around her. Cinematic wide landscape shot.

captions.local: Cô gái Việt tiếng Trung còn kém
lại phải giả làm phu nhân hào môn
Ngày mai bác sĩ sẽ đến
cô sẽ sống sót thế nào
Theo dõi tập sau nhé
